response.justification: Strong senior software developer with extensive open-source background, Linux/Unix familiarity, and broad polyglot experience including D, Node.js, and TypeScript. However, the role requires C1 German proficiency (candidate is only basic), explicit team leadership/mentoring track record, and UML/architecture modeling depth — none of which are clearly demonstrated. Technical chops are solid, but the language gap and lack of formal leadership experience are material risks for a Head of Development role.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux ecosystem experience, including founding GISCollective
Broad polyglot architecture exposure across web, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Strong community/teaching background (workshops, dojos, Selenium course) signals mentoring aptitude
concerns: German proficiency listed as 'Basic' — far below the required C1 level
No explicit Head of Development or formal team-leadership role in employment history
Python and UML modeling expertise not evidenced in the resume

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership track record
